IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (11480899.pdf)
SUMMARY: Human Resources Manager with practical understanding of business needs. Areas of expertise include conflict management and employee training. Promotes a team-oriented and open-door environment that is conducive to a successful staff.
SKILLS: Compensation/payroll, Performance management strategies, Regulatory compliance, Interviewing expertise, Staff development, Compensation/benefits administration, Policy/program development, Salary structure/compensation analysis, Employee relations, Administrative support, Benefits, Business plan, Continuous improvement, Decision making, English, Film, Hiring, Human Resource, HR, Law, Legal compliance, Managerial, Managing, Organizational, Payroll, Performance appraisal, Performance management, Personnel, Purchasing, Recruitment, Reporting, Scheduling, Strategic, Workflow
